reason: R1: balance 3 < requested 5, 余额不足
R5: sick >2 days, no certificate, 病假超过2天需提供医疗证明
A2: sick <=2 days (R3 exempt for sick, R5 not triggered since days<=2)
R4: peak_season, annual, advance=7<14, 旺季年假需提前14天申请
R2: personal >3 days, 事假单次不超过3天
R3: dept_absence=0.32>=0.30, annual not exempt, 部门在岗率不足
A1: maternity always approved (R3 exempt for maternity)
E1: no reject triggered, A3 fails (advance=5<7), 需主管审批
